mapper.delete:
delete from COLUMN_BLOODLINE
upper(tableNameen) = upper(#{tableName}) and upper(data_TYPE) = upper(#{type})
and upper(TABLEID) = upper(#{tableId})

select.if: select distinct case when COLUMN_CHINAME is null then COLUMN_NAME else COLUMN_NAME ||' —> '|| COLUMN_CHINAME end as showColumnName, COLUMN_NAME as targetColumnName , COLUMN_CHINAME as targetColumnChiName, NODE_ID as nodeId from COLUMN_BLOODLINE_RELATION where upper(NODE_ID) = upper(#{nodeId}) order by COLUMN_NAME asc

select distinct case when COLUMN_CHINAME is null then COLUMN_NAME else COLUMN_NAME ||' —> '|| COLUMN_CHINAME end as showColumnName, COLUMN_NAME as targetColumnName , COLUMN_CHINAME as targetColumnChiName, NODE_ID as nodeId from COLUMN_BLOODLINE_RELATION where upper(NODE_ID) = upper(#{nodeId}) order by COLUMN_NAME asc

select distinct case when COLUMN_CHINAME is null then COLUMN_NAME else COLUMN_NAME ||' —> '|| COLUMN_CHINAME end as showColumnName, COLUMN_NAME as targetColumnName , COLUMN_CHINAME as targetColumnChiName, NODE_ID as nodeId from COLUMN_BLOODLINE_RELATION where 1=2

mapper.select: select distinct case when COLUMN_CHINAME is null then COLUMN_NAME else COLUMN_NAME ||' —> '|| COLUMN_CHINAME end as showColumnName, COLUMN_NAME as targetColumnName , COLUMN_CHINAME as targetColumnChiName, NODE_ID as nodeId from COLUMN_BLOODLINE_RELATION where upper(NODE_ID) = upper(#{nodeId}) and upper(COLUMN_NAME) in ( select distinct upper(FIELDNAME) from COLUMN_BLOODLINE where upper(TABLEID||'|'||TARGETCODE||'|'||TABLENAMEEN||'|'||DATA_TYPE) = upper(#{nodeId})) order by COLUMN_NAME asc

select factoryId, columnName, tableId, tableCode, tableName, type, columnChiName, nodeId, tableNameCh, tableIdCh, nodeName from( select FACTORY_ID as factoryId, COLUMN_NAME as columnName, TABLE_ID as tableId, TABLE_CODE as tableCode, TABLE_NAME as tableName, TYPE as type, COLUMN_CHINAME as columnChiName, upper(NODE_ID) as nodeId, TABLE_NAME_CH as tableNameCh, TABLE_ID_CH as tableIdCh, DATA_NODE_NAME as nodeName, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by NODE_ID||COLUMN_NAME order by INSERT_DATE desc) as num from column_bloodline_relation)t where t.num = 1 and upper(t.TYPE) = upper(#{type})

select tableNameEn, fieldName, fieldType, fieldLen, fieldFormat, tableId, targetCode, dataType, nodeId from (select TABLENAMEEN as tableNameEn, FIELDNAME as fieldName , FIELDTYPE as fieldType, FIELDLEN as fieldLen, FIELDFORMAT as fieldFormat, TABLEID as tableId , TARGETCODE as targetCode, DATA_TYPE as dataType, upper(TABLENAMEEN ||'|'|| TABLEID ||'|'|| TARGETCODE ) as nodeId, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by TABLEID || TARGETCODE || TABLENAMEEN || FIELDNAME || DATA_TYPE order by INSERT_DATE desc) as num from column_bloodline) t where t.num = 1

select columnName from(
select distinct TARGET_COLUMN_NAME as columnName from TABLE_COLUMN_BLOODLINE where upper(SOURCE_NODE_ID) = upper(#{sourceNodeId}) and upper(TARGET_NODE_ID) = upper(#{targetNodeId}) and upper(SOURCE_COLUMN_NAME) =upper(#{columnName})
and upper(TARGET_COLUMN_NAME) EXISTS ( select upper(fieldname) from column_bloodline where upper(TABLEID ||'|'|| TARGETCODE ||'|'|| TABLENAMEEN) = upper(#{targetNodeId}) and upper(fieldname) = upper(#{columnName}) )
select distinct SOURCE_COLUMN_NAME as columnName from TABLE_COLUMN_BLOODLINE where upper(SOURCE_NODE_ID) = upper(#{sourceNodeId}) and upper(TARGET_NODE_ID) = upper(#{targetNodeId}) and upper(TARGET_COLUMN_NAME) =upper(#{columnName})
and upper(SOURCE_COLUMN_NAME) EXISTS ( select upper(fieldname) from column_bloodline where upper(TABLEID ||'|'|| TARGETCODE ||'|'|| TABLENAMEEN) = upper(#{sourceNodeId}) )
)
select tableId, objectId from synlte.object where deleted = 0 and relate_tablename = 'OBJECTFIELD'
mapper.delete: delete from m_flow_three where insert_time < sysdate -50
delete from M_BUSINESS_INSTANCE where START_TIME < sysdate -50
mapper.select: select TABLEID,TABLENAME,OBJECTNAME,STORE_TYPE as storeType,PROJECT_NAME as projectName,PROJECT_NAME_CN as projectNameCh from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO where import_flag = 1 and store_type in (1,5)
mapper.delete: delete from M_NODE_IN_OUT_TABLE where insert_date < sysdate - 14
